LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: DEFENDANT DENISE ZUSMAN, M.D.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT.NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DENISE ZUSMAN'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
